meaning: n.(北非)柏柏尔人,柏柏尔语adj.柏柏尔人的
examples: Our journey takes us to picturesque Berber villages and lovely beaches.
Scrape the wax loose with a butter knife (be gentle with Berber carpets; the loops fray easily).
Now, shaken and in some cases overthrown, they have seen Berber activism take on a new lease of life.
Built of earth, stone and palm, the Berber villages decay gracefully, returning themselves to the earth.
An increasingly strident language movement is demanding that the Berber tongue, Tamarzight, be taught in schools.
